property.name: include
property.value: Map:Common Data

property.name: image
property.value: Noelle's House map.png

properties.property: ''(You could barely see it. A patch of sunlight that shouldn't be there.)'' ''(It felt different in your hand. And you knew what it was.)'' '''[first interactionwith any SAVE point in the Light World]'''

property.name: page
property.value: SAVE Point

property.name: description
property.value: An angel doll. When [[Susie]] and [[Noelle]] enter the basement, the [[SOUL]] must move to the Christmas tree. From there, the SOUL becomes hidden inside the angel doll.

property.name: description
property.value: A red guitar. Upon interacting, the narration states that there is a code to the [[shelter]] inside. [[Kris]] rips out their [[SOUL]] before the code can be fully read.

property.name: description
property.value: Susie and Noelle notice the noise and enter Dess's room. Deciding to wait for the next noise, they sit down nearby Dess's bed.

property.name: description
property.value: While [[Noelle]] and [[Susie]] talk and wait for any loud noise, [[Kris]] attacks the [[SOUL]] to keep it away from the guitar. They stop attacking the SOUL after Noelle and Susie stop talking.

property.name: description
property.value: The [[SOUL]] is threw to here by [[Kris]].

property.name: description
property.value: After catching the [[SOUL]] again, [[Kris]] walks to the piano and plays [[Hidden music tracks#Kris's piano songs|various songs]]. On the [[Weird Route]], without Kris's presence, the [[SOUL]] can play the piano itself, but can only make noise.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Asgore]] can be seen cleaning the toilet, walking away once he finishes.

property.name: description
property.value: After leaving the bathroom, [[Asgore]] appears in Carol's room to look at the corkboard.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Noelle]] talks with [[Kris]] about the events that happened off-screen prior to [[Chapter 4]]. When the [[SOUL]] forces its way back into Kris's body, Kris is forced to re-equip the [[Thorn Ring]] back onto Noelle.

property.name: page
property.value: Weird Route/Chapter 4

property.name: description
property.value: Upon moving the gift box and reaching the switch, the power cuts off, which causes [[Susie]] and [[Noelle]] to head to the basement.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Kris]] throws the [[SOUL]] into the trash can and repeatedly kicks it. When [[Asgore]] interrupts, he tells them that [[Carol]] has asked everyone to leave.

property.name: description
property.value: Upon interacting with the couch, [[Kris]], [[Susie]], and [[Noelle]] begin their study session. When Noelle receives a phone call, Kris is directed by Susie to search the house for the [[shelter]] code while she distracts Noelle.

property.name: description
property.value: When [[Susie]] and [[Noelle]] leave [[Dess]]'s room with the guitar, [[Asgore]] interrupts and sits on the couch with them, Shortly after, [[Carol]] arrives and expels Susie from the house.

properties.property: [[Noelle]]'s computer. When Noelle is not in the party, [[Kris]] can check the cycling wallpapers. The descriptions are respectively: *''Noelle's family in the snow.'' *''Noelle's family looking festive.'' *''Noelle's family edited to be elves.'' *''a motion-blurred photo of you as a kid.'' *''Dess holding a cracked baseball bat.'' *''a picture of a far-off, snowy city.'' *''Noelle and Dess at the pageant as kids.'' *''some green dog puppet thing.''

property.name: description
property.value: A Santa figurine, making noise upon touching.

property.name: description
property.value: A Santa figurine with dead batteries, making lower and slower noises upon touching.

property.name: description
property.value: A Santa figurine with dead batteries, making lower and slower noises upon interacting.

property.name: description
property.value: A Santa figurine, making noise upon interacting.

property.name: description
property.value: A holiday treat catcher, which can automatically catch the [[SOUL]].

property.name: description
property.value: A Santa figurine, making noise upon interacting.

property.name: description
property.value: A Santa figurine with dead batteries, making lower and slower noises upon touching.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Kris]] picks up the Holiday Pencil from the container on [[Noelle]]'s desk.

property.name: page
property.value: Holiday Pencil
